QuestVars_TrustTest.notes: QuestGraph never references a faction bool, but faction-conditional DialogueTree(s) referencing this quest's GQuestState exist (nemeton,ruinenlager). That could be dialogue flavour OR a gate on the quest offer - not distinguishable statically. Journal topic group = TopicGroup_Magiewald (NOTE: group is a LOCATION/hub, not a faction - e.g. QuestVars_HauerNemeton is Nemeton-side content filed under TopicGroup_RuinCamp).

QuestVars_ShotsForRipper.name: QuestVars_ShotsForRipper
QuestVars_ShotsForRipper.title: Eugen's Vote to Join the Remnants
QuestVars_ShotsForRipper.notes: QuestGraph references faction bools of BOTH sides (moor=JoinedMoorlager ruin=JoinedRuinenlager) but ships NO per-faction journal entries. Referencing both does NOT imply neutrality: QuestVars_PartOfTheRuinenlager is a proven Ruinenlager-locked quest that also references JoinedMoorlager (as an anti-check). Polarity is not statically provable (NodeCanvas graph logic is LZ77-compressed inside _serializedBytes), so this is excluded rather than risk an unreachable location. Journal topic group = TopicGroup_RuinCamp (NOTE: group is a LOCATION/hub, not a faction - e.g. QuestVars_HauerNemeton is Nemeton-side content filed under TopicGroup_RuinCamp).

QuestVars_FavourOfCraftsmenCarpenters.notes: Neither the QuestGraph nor any faction-conditional DialogueTree references any faction bool -> no static evidence of any faction dependency. QuestVars_BanditsOnTheBridge.name: QuestVars_BanditsOnTheBridge
QuestVars_BanditsOnTheBridge.title: The bridge, again?
QuestVars_BanditsOnTheBridge.notes: QuestGraph references only moorlager/nemeton-side faction bool(s) (JoinedMoorlager). The check POLARITY (requires-joined vs blocked-if-joined) is NOT statically provable - NodeCanvas graph logic is LZ77-compressed inside _serializedBytes. Both readings occur in this game, so this is excluded rather than risk an unreachable location. Journal topic group = TopicGroup_Nemeton (NOTE: group is a LOCATION/hub, not a faction - e.g. QuestVars_HauerNemeton is Nemeton-side content filed under TopicGroup_RuinCamp).
